title: Executive Order 6038—Authorizing the Appointment of Laurence Gouverneur Hoes
text:
Mr. Laurence Gouverneur Hoes may be appointed to a position in the Veterans' Administration without regard to the requirements of the civil-service rules.
This order is issued upon the recommendation of the Administrator of Veterans' Affairs.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
February 20, 1933.
